# Journal: 2026-04-12

## Summary

Completed new topology implementation and all unit tests. Submitted for code review.

## Work Done

- Finalized hybrid windowing topology implementation in HybridStatisticsTopology.kt.
- Implemented HoppingWindowAggregator with 15-min size, 5-min advance interval.
- Implemented SessionWindowAggregator with 30-minute inactivity gap.
- Implemented WindowCombiner merging hopping and session aggregations by event key.
- Added DeadLetterRouter: catches Avro deserialization exceptions, routes to nestads-statistics-dlq.
- Added BackpressureHandler: monitors JVM heap via MemoryMXBean, pauses consumer at 80% threshold.
- Wrote unit tests for HoppingWindowAggregator: 18 tests covering normal, late arrival, out-of-order events.
- Wrote unit tests for SessionWindowAggregator: 15 tests covering merge, split, gap boundary.
- Wrote unit tests for DeadLetterRouter: 10 tests for malformed Avro, null key, oversized record.
- Wrote unit tests for BackpressureHandler: 8 tests for threshold trigger, recovery, multiple triggers.
- Wrote integration test for Phase 1 dual-topology deployment (EmbeddedKafka).
- Wrote integration test for Phase 2 10% traffic split simulation.
- Wrote automated diff checker for shadow mode output comparison.
- Wrote integration test for rebalance scenario during active windowing.
- Submitted PR for code review — assigned to @kafka-expert and @sre-lead.
- Ran full unit test suite: 51 tests passed, 0 failed.

## Decisions

- BackpressureHandler uses polling interval of 1 second (low overhead, sufficient for 80% threshold).
- DeadLetterRouter includes original partition+offset in DLQ record headers for reprocessing.
- WindowCombiner uses event key as join key (not session ID) for correctness across window types.

## Blockers

- Code review pending — @kafka-expert has capacity tomorrow.
- SRE sign-off for Phase 4 50% shift not yet received.
- Downstream consumer (nestads-reporting-service) schema update blocked on WP-4199.

## Next

- Address code review feedback.
- Deploy Phase 1 to staging after review approval.
- Run Phase 2 traffic split test in staging.
- Begin 48-hour shadow mode validation (Phase 3).
- Coordinate with @sre-lead on Phase 4 approval timeline.

## Notes

- EmbeddedKafka for integration tests uses 3 brokers to simulate production RF=3.
- Shadow mode diff checker script: scripts/shadow-diff.sh (compares JSON output line-by-line).
